ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarkation point of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger */,
  "sibling_spouses" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parents_children" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "embarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of embarkation */,
  "boarding_point" TEXT /* Detailed boarding point */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number or 'None' */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Name of the rescue ship */,
  "rescue_date" TEXT /* Date of rescue */,
  "final_destination" TEXT /* Final destination of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_documents_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the ship */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the ship was launched */,
  "disaster_date" TEXT /* Date of the disaster, if applicable */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the disaster */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator or company owning the ship */,
  "vessel_class" TEXT /* Class of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_log_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
column_names: Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived)
Number of siblings or spouses aboard
Number of parents or children aboard
ID of the passenger the document belongs to
User ID of the person who uploaded the document
Date of the disaster, if applicable
Name of the operator or company owning the ship
Unique identifier for each log entry
ID of the researcher who performed the action
